message: ci: use git context for docker metadata extraction

files.patch:
@@ -49,6 +49,7 @@ jobs:
         id: meta
         uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
         with:
+          context: git
           images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
           tags: |
             type=ref,event=branch
@@ -98,6 +99,7 @@ jobs:
         id: meta
         uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
         with:
+          context: git
           images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
           tags: |
             type=ref,event=branch
@@ -128,6 +130,9 @@ jobs:
       contents: read
     needs: [build-amd64, build-arm64]
     steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
       - name: Login to GitHub Container Registry
         uses: docker/login-action@v3
         with:
@@ -139,6 +144,7 @@ jobs:
         id: meta
         uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
         with:
+          context: git
           images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
           tags: |
             type=ref,event=branch
